name: Athletics
description: Lifting, pushing, pulling, jumping, running, and swimming. Used for physical exertion, climbing, and swimming.
longDescription: The Athletics skill covers feats of physical prowess including lifting, pushing, pulling, jumping, running, and swimming. Used whenever a character needs to exert themselves physically, climb a sheer surface, or swim across a body of water.

name: Barter
description: Buying and selling, negotiating prices, and making deals with traders.
longDescription: The Barter skill governs buying and selling, negotiating prices, and making deals with traders and merchants across the wasteland. A skilled barterer can stretch their bottle caps much further.

name: Big Guns
description: Using heavy weapons such as miniguns, Fat Mans, and gatling lasers.
longDescription: The Big Guns skill covers the use of heavy weapons such as miniguns, Fat Man launchers, and gatling lasers. These weapons are powerful but require significant strength and endurance to operate effectively.

name: Energy Weapons
description: Using energy-based firearms like laser guns, plasma guns, and gauss weaponry.
longDescription: The Energy Weapons skill governs the use of energy-based firearms like laser guns, plasma guns, and gauss weaponry. These high-tech weapons require specialized knowledge to operate and maintain.

name: Explosives
description: Using, throwing, placing, and detonating explosive devices like grenades and mines.
longDescription: The Explosives skill covers using, throwing, placing, and detonating explosive devices like grenades and mines. A character with this skill knows how to handle volatile materials safely and effectively.

name: Lockpick
description: Opening locks without the key, picking safes and locked doors.
longDescription: The Lockpick skill allows a character to open locks without the key, including picking safes and locked doors. Essential for scavengers who want access to secured areas and containers.

name: Medicine
description: Healing people, stabilizing the dying, administering chems, and treating radiation poisoning.
longDescription: The Medicine skill covers healing people, stabilizing the dying, administering chems, and treating radiation poisoning. A skilled medic is invaluable to any wasteland party.

name: Melee Weapons
description: Fighting with bats, clubs, knives, boards, wrenches, and sledges.
longDescription: The Melee Weapons skill governs fighting with bats, clubs, knives, boards, wrenches, sledges, and other hand-to-hand weapons. These weapons never run out of ammunition.

name: Pilot
description: Operating vehicles, from buggies and motorcycles to Vertibirds and tanks.
longDescription: The Pilot skill covers operating vehicles, from buggies and motorcycles to Vertibirds and tanks. A skilled pilot can navigate the treacherous wasteland terrain and gain a tactical advantage.

name: Repair
description: Fixing stuff, crafting things, building machines, and modifying weapons.
longDescription: The Repair skill covers fixing stuff, crafting things, building machines, and modifying weapons. One of the most versatile skills in the wasteland, essential for keeping equipment operational.

name: Science
description: Hacking computers, programming robots, and brewing chems.
longDescription: The Science skill covers hacking computers, programming robots, and brewing chems. A high-tech skill valued by those who work with pre-War technology and automation.

name: Small Guns
description: Shooting with pistols, rifles, and shotguns.
longDescription: The Small Guns skill covers shooting with pistols, rifles, and shotguns. The most common combat skill in the wasteland, as small firearms are plentiful and ammunition is relatively easy to find.

name: Sneak
description: Moving quietly, staying hidden, and avoiding detection.
longDescription: The Sneak skill covers moving quietly, staying hidden, and avoiding detection. Essential for scouts, thieves, and anyone who prefers to avoid unnecessary combat.

name: Speech
description: Making friends, influencing people, and lying to them if you have to.
longDescription: The Speech skill covers making friends, influencing people, and lying when necessary. In the wasteland, words can be as powerful as bullets, and a silver tongue can open doors that brute force cannot.

name: Survival
description: Foraging, hunting, cooking, and enduring the wastes.
longDescription: The Survival skill covers foraging, hunting, cooking, and enduring the harsh conditions of the wastes. A survivalist can find food and water where others see only barren wasteland.

name: Throwing
description: Launching weapons from your hands, like spears or knives.
longDescription: The Throwing skill covers launching weapons from your hands, such as spears, knives, and tomahawks. A useful combat skill for those who prefer silent, ranged attacks.

name: Unarmed
description: Fighting without a weapon by making unarmed attacks.
longDescription: The Unarmed skill covers fighting without a weapon by making unarmed attacks. A character with this skill knows how to throw powerful punches and execute combat maneuvers without any equipment.
